SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister

Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands

package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands
Core annotations for defining Discord Slash Commands.

This package provides the primary building blocks for commands:

  • SlashCommand - Top-level command definition
  • Option - Command parameters and inputs
  • Choice - Fixed selection values for options

Author:
Florian Becker
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api
     
    de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands
    Provides the annotations required to define complex Slash Command hierarchies.
    de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem
    Provides classes and annotations for the automated background task system.
  • Annotation Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    Choice
    Represents a predefined choice for a command option.
    Option
    Defines a command option (parameter) for a Slash Command.
    SlashCommand
    Marks a method to be registered as a global Discord Slash Command.
